result.summary: Found 2 visually noticeable issues: a sticky scroll prompt is covering important legal text at the bottom, and the top-right header CTA appears blank/unlabeled.

issues.description: A large translucent "SCROLL DOWN" overlay sits on top of the fine-print disclaimer area, making the legal text hard to read.
issues.suggestion: Move the scroll prompt out of the content area, reduce its size, or hide it once the user starts scrolling so it doesn't block important text.

issues.description: The yellow pill-shaped button in the top-right header appears empty with no visible label or icon.
issues.suggestion: Verify the button text/icon is loading correctly and add a clear CTA label such as "Join" or "Sign In".
